description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow for building, testing, and releasing a Python project. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch, pull requests, and pushes to specific tags. It should run tests on multiple operating systems (Ubuntu, macOS, Windows) and Python versions (3.8-3.14, PyPy), including tests without the Global Interpreter Lock (GIL). The workflow should also build source distributions and wheels for various platforms, storing the artifacts for later use.
